name: Accordion
description: Accordion: a group of collapsible sections

api.signature: new Accordion(sections: AccordionSection[], style: Partial<Style> = {}, opts: AccordionOptions = {},)

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow multiple sections open at once

props.name: openIndex
props.description: Index of the initially open section

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback fired when a section is toggled
